gated_flags./MIR: PERMITTED ONLY after the Step 7 destination-only inventory classifies every extraneous path, AND with protected_dirs/protected_files excluded. /MIR is REQUIRED for exact convergence and for rollback (it is the only way files introduced by a newer release are removed).

rollback: robocopy {backup_root}\app-baseline-<SHA>-<STAMP> C:\PZ\app /MIR <protections> — restore ONLY from the validated pre-deploy backup artifact. NEVER git revert / git checkout / any mutation of C:\PZ-main.
notes: /XO is FORBIDDEN (2026-07-19): it skips files it judges not-newer, silently leaving stale destination files and producing a partial, version-skewed release. This caused the 2026-07-07 ImportError-on-start incident. Deployment is exact convergence from an immutable artifact, never a timestamp heuristic.

/MIR is no longer blanket-forbidden — it is GATED. It is REQUIRED for exact convergence and is the only mechanism that removes files a newer release introduced (a /E rollback would leave e.g. services/document_reconciler.py behind, running against baseline code). It may run ONLY after the Step 7 destination-only inventory classifies every extraneous path, and ONLY with protected_dirs/protected_files excluded.
deploy bytes come from artifact_root\app-<SHA> (immutable, read-only, hash-manifested), never from a live git tree; rollback bytes come from backup_root, never from git.
Lesson D: reconcile Windows-local commits before git pull --ff-only
source_root is C:\PZ-main — the SOLE deploy source. C:\PZ-verify owns the repository .git and is the verification-read tree; it is NEVER a deploy source (it is routinely detached and dirty).
C:\Users\Super Fashion\PZ APP was DECOMMISSIONED 2026-07-17 and deleted; it was this profile's source_root until 2026-07-19 and must never reappear here.
Lesson J: engine_files are NOT covered by the service/app sync — they need the separate engine_src -> engine_dst robocopy, verified by content hash, not by Python import.
